footer.tagline: Where African ingenuity meets AI innovation. We bridge tradition and technology to build the future.

home.heroSub: KEMI AI blends African ingenuity with artificial intelligence to transform businesses through digitization, data science, and AI integration.
home.servicesSub: End-to-end transformation services rooted in deep expertise and delivered with care.
home.service1Desc: We convert paper-based and legacy processes into modern digital workflows. Your operations, reimagined for speed and scale.
home.service2Desc: We turn raw data into strategic gold. Dashboards, forecasting, and analytics that reveal the story your numbers are telling.
home.service3Desc: We weave intelligence into your products and operations — from LLMs to custom models — making AI practical and profitable.
home.processSub: A process refined across dozens of engagements.
home.step1Desc: We show up, we listen deeply. No assumptions, no cookie-cutter playbooks. Every engagement starts with understanding your world.
home.step2Desc: We architect solutions that fit your reality — budget, team, timeline, and ambition. Clean architecture, pragmatic choices.
home.step3Desc: We execute with craftsmanship. Code, data pipelines, models — built to last, documented, and handed over with pride.
home.step4Desc: We don't disappear after launch. We help you scale, iterate, and own your transformation long-term.
home.ctaSub: Whether you're starting from scratch or scaling up, we meet you where you are and take you where you need to go.

about.heroSub: KEMI AI was born at the intersection of African problem-solving and cutting-edge technology. We exist to make digital transformation practical, accessible, and deeply human.
about.storyP1: The name KEMI means "to take care of" in Yoruba — and that is the ethos we bring to every engagement. We take care of your data, your systems, your teams, and your outcomes.
about.storyP2: We started KEMI AI because we saw too many organizations paralyzed by the pace of technological change. Businesses drowning in data they couldn't use. Legacy systems holding back innovation. AI hype without AI impact.
about.storyP3: So we built an agency that bridges the gap — combining the craft of software engineering with the clarity of strategic consulting. From first audit to final deployment, we bring the same care, rigor, and honesty.
about.valuesSub: Three principles that guide every decision we make and every project we ship.
about.value1Desc: We speak plainly, design simply, and build things that stakeholders at every level can understand and own. No black boxes.
about.value2Desc: Every engagement is tied to business outcomes. If we can't measure it, we don't ship it. Gold standard or nothing.
about.value3Desc: We build for tomorrow's scale. Modular architecture, clean data foundations, and AI-native design from day one.
about.diffSub: We're not just technologists. We are translators between business ambition and technical execution.
about.diff2: Engineering + strategy — never one without the other

services.heroSub: From digitizing your operations to deploying intelligent systems — we cover every layer of the modern data and AI stack with precision and care.
services.service1Desc: We convert manual, paper-based, and legacy workflows into scalable digital systems. This is the bedrock — without it, no amount of AI can fix broken processes.
services.service2Desc: We turn raw data into strategic gold. From real-time dashboards to forecasting engines, we design analytics systems that illuminate your business reality and drive decisions.
services.service3Desc: We integrate intelligence into your products, operations, and customer experiences — from identifying the right use case to deploying and monitoring models in production.
services.service4Desc: Not sure where to begin? We provide vendor-neutral advisory to build a transformation roadmap that respects your budget, timeline, and risk appetite — no overselling, no fluff.
services.ctaSub: We'll help you figure it out. Book a no-obligation discovery session.

contact.heroSub: Tell us what you're working on. We'll respond within 48 hours with a thoughtful perspective — not a canned pitch.
contact.responseValue: We reply to every inquiry within 48 hours — usually faster.
contact.locationValue: Remote-first, globally distributed. We work with clients anywhere in the world.
contact.messagePlaceholder: What are you looking to build, transform, or improve? The more detail, the better our first response.
contact.privacyNote: We respect your inbox. No spam, ever.
